name: Rigged Draw
flavor: You palm the card it needed and hand back one that guarantees it loses.
description: You gesture at a creature you can see within range, and fate quietly turns against it. Choose one creature within range; the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the start of your next turn is made with disadvantage. This has no effect on saving throws — for those, see your Gambit's Jinx.
sheetSummary: Bonus action, 30 ft, cooldown 2. Target's next attack roll or ability check before the start of your next turn is made with disadvantage. Does not affect saving throws.
